title: rhododendron heterolepis
intro: Rhododendron heterolepis, a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of Japan, is a species within the rhododendron family known for its medicinal properties and ornamental value. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its purported anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Rhododendron heterolepis or its herbal preparations may provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Rhododendron heterolepis is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Japanese medicine, known as Kampo.
